title: TG TOUGH GLOVE BOA PRO (XL) Nitrile Gloves (Pack Of 100) | Strong Black Disposable Gloves | Powder & Latex Free Strong Lightweight Mechanic Industrial Gloves
features: 🧤 Our Dexterous Boa Pro Black Nitrile Gloves Provide Excellent Protection Against Chemicals, Oils, And Punctures, Making Them Ideal For Mechanics And DIY Jobs.

🧤 It Boasts A 5mil Thickness At Finger, 4mil At Palm And 3mil At Cuff Making It One Of The Best All-Rounded Disposable Nitrile Gloves In Its Class All While Offering Type C Level Chemical Test Approvals.
🧤 With Three Size Options (Nitrile Gloves Medium, Nitrile Gloves Large, Nitrile Gloves Extra Large), These Disposable Gloves Are Perfect For Anyone Who Needs A Comfortable, Snug Fit.
🧤 These Gloves Are Made From Nitrile, Which Is Resistant To Chemicals, Oils, And Solvents, Making Them An Ideal Choice For Those Who Work With Hazardous Materials.
🧤 Boa Pro Gloves Are The Perfect Solution For People Who Need To Wear Gloves For Extended Periods Of Time, Thanks To Their Durable Yet Lightweight Construction.
description: Product Description Chemical Protection Introducing our reliable BOA Pro that offer a grade C chemical protection level, providing you with a versatile solution for various tasks. From handling chemicals in laboratories to janitorial services, these gloves offer a reliable barrier against a wide range of substances. Protect your hands while maintaining dexterity and flexibility, thanks to their high-quality construction. With these gloves, you can confidently tackle your chemical-related tasks knowing you have the right protection on your side. Well Rounded Use Experience the ultimate versatility with our BOA Pro, designed for well-rounded use across multiple industries. Whether you're in healthcare, automotive, or food service, these gloves are the perfect companion. Their exceptional durability and tensile strength ensure they can withstand rigorous activities and resist punctures or tears. Enjoy the freedom of movement and tactile sensitivity, allowing you to handle delicate objects with precision. Our gloves are here to support you in every task, making them the go-to choice for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike. Lightweight and Dexterous Discover a new level of comfort and agility with our lightweight BOA Pro gloves. Engineered with your needs in mind, these gloves provide a snug fit that feels like a second skin, allowing you to maintain your natural dexterity. The lightweight construction ensures you can wear them for extended periods without discomfort. Whether you're working on intricate tasks or requiring superior finger sensitivity, our gloves are up to the challenge. Experience the perfect balance of protection and flexibility, and enjoy the freedom of movement that enables you to work efficiently and effectively.
